response.justification: While Bogdan has extensive software development experience and strong technical skills in C, C++, JavaScript, and other languages, his resume does not explicitly demonstrate experience with embedded networking, Linux kernel modifications, or security features relevant to the role. Additionally, there is no evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or direct experience with networking technologies like MACsec, IEEE 802.1X, or switch chip development. His background is more aligned with web and application development rather than embedded LAN-switch security products.
strengths: Strong proficiency in C and C++ programming languages
Extensive experience in software development across multiple domains (embedded, web, mobile)
Experience with testing methodologies (TDD, CI/CD) and team collaboration
concerns: No explicit experience with embedded networking or LAN-switch products
Lack of demonstrated knowledge in security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X
No evidence of native-level Japanese proficiency or direct experience with network switch operations
